overall.description: Gameplay footage from a third-person perspective showing a character with long red hair exploring a gothic castle environment. The character walks from an exterior courtyard through grand entrance halls, up staircases, along corridors with gothic windows, and through dark stairwells before emerging into a large interior hall with another character present.

events.description: character approaches and opens the large wooden entrance doors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the stone courtyard toward the castle entrance

entered.detail: large ornate wooden double doors with metal studs and handles
gray stone gothic architecture with tall arched windows
large stone planter with white flowers
large stone planter with white flowers

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a cobblestone courtyard toward an imposing gothic castle entrance. Large wooden doors and stone architecture dominate the view as the character approaches the threshold.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance hall with main staircase

events.description: character enters the castle through the large wooden doors into the entrance hall
character begins ascending the grand central staircase

agents.ego_description: entering the castle and climbing the grand central staircase with ornate railings

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with carved wooden railings splitting into two directions
framed portraits hanging on the stone walls
stone owl sculpture on the newel post of the railing

segments.scene_description: Inside the castle, the character enters a grand hall with high ceilings and begins ascending a magnificent stone staircase. Portraits line the walls and an owl statue marks the turning of the stairs.

events.description: passing suits of armor lined along the corridor wall

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper corridor passing suits of armor and gothic windows

entered.detail: tall pointed arch windows with tracery letting in natural light
medieval knight armor standing against the wall
stone seating along the window wall
dark wooden door at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an upper corridor illuminated by large gothic windows on the left. Suits of armor line the right wall, and the character approaches a wooden door at the corridor's end.

events.description: entering the darker stairwell from the lit corridor
emerging from darkness into a brightly lit hall

agents.ego_description: climbing the dimly lit stone stairwell toward the light at the top

entered.detail: narrow winding staircase with rough stone walls
gothic stone arch marking the exit from the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The character opens the wooden door and enters a dark, narrow stairwell. Climbing the stone steps, the character moves from dim interior lighting toward a bright archway exit.

events.description: emerging from the dark stairwell into a large sunlit hall
character approaches another student standing near the stairs

agents.ego_description: entering the grand hall and approaching another student near the staircase

notable_agents.action: standing at the top of the stairs facing the approaching character

entered.detail: sweeping dual staircase with ornate stone railings
tall fluted stone pillars supporting the upper level
tall fluted stone pillars supporting the upper level
potted plants hanging from the upper balcony

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a vast grand hall with greenish natural light filtering through high windows. A grand double staircase dominates the space, and another student stands near the stairs as the character approaches.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an imposing exterior courtyard into the depths of a gothic castle, culminating in a vast, light-filled interior hall. It begins with the character crossing a cobblestone courtyard toward massive wooden doors, which open to reveal a grand hall where the camera ascends a magnificent stone staircase past portraits and an owl statue. The scene then shifts into an upper corridor lined with suits of armor and illuminated by gothic windows, leading the character through a wooden door and up a dark, narrow stairwell. As the dim interior lighting gives way to a bright archway, the camera finally emerges into a sprawling grand hall bathed in greenish natural light, moving toward another student standing beside a dominant double staircase.
